description_long: This sculpture is a bust of a man, rendered in a realistic style, with a blue-tinted face and a formal suit including a bow tie. The bust is mounted on a cylindrical pedestal that appears to be made of stone or concrete, with an inscription visible on the front. The base of the pedestal is irregular and appears to be set on a roughly circular platform with a marbled or patterned texture. The back of the bust is smooth and unadorned, while the front features detailed facial features and clothing folds. The overall color palette includes blue, brown, gray, and white tones, with the head and upper torso contrasting against the lighter pedestal. The sculpture gives the impression of commemorating a notable individual, likely intended for public display.
description: A realistic bust of a man in a suit with a blue face, mounted on a cylindrical stone pedestal with an inscription and a marbled base.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the detailed face, bow tie, and the inscription on the pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head and the curvature of the pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the smooth back of the bust and the marbled base, with no facial details visible.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the profile of the head and the inscription partially visible on the pedestal.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture appears to be designed for outdoor or public urban settings, such as a park, plaza, or sidewalk.
